summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for Lot 02 admin auth flows on http://127.0.0.1:3010. All requested API and UI scenarios passed (unauthenticated me, invalid/valid login, cookie session, protected admin route, logout + me 401).
critical_code_review_comments: app/api/auth/login/route.ts catches all thrown errors and always maps to HTTP 400; unexpected infra/database errors should return 500 to preserve error semantics.
greeters/.env currently contains DB credentials and AUTH_SECRET committed in workspace; ensure secret handling policy excludes real secrets from tracked files.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing seeded admin account: admin@greeters.local)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow validated end-to-end with both requests (pytest) and browser automation. Session cookie name observed: greeters_session; logout sets Max-Age=0 and me returns 401 afterwards.
rca of the issue: No functional blocker reproduced in requested scope.
